evaluators.name: Most Affordable 3-Day Meditation Retreat with Private Room & Vegetarian Meals (Next Month)
evaluators.description: Checks whether the user booked, after baseline, the cheapest qualifying 3-day meditation retreat next month that offers private rooms and vegetarian meals, with a private room type and vegetarian meal plan selected.

evaluators.name: Highest-Rated Beginner Course Enrollment Within 14 Days Under $300 With Live Q&A
evaluators.description: Checks whether the user enrolled, after baseline, in the highest-rated beginner-level course starting within 14 days, under $300, with live Q&A, using the standard or lowest-priced non-premium tier.

evaluators.name: Book 60-Min 1:1 Session with More Experienced of First Two Mentors Next Friday Evening
evaluators.description: Checks whether, after baseline, the user booked a 60-minute 1:1 mentoring session under $120 on next Friday between 4–7pm with the more experienced of the first two eligible mentors shown by the search logic.

evaluators.name: Create 5-Day Custom Retreat Next Month with Mid-Range Room & 3 Sub-$50 Workshops (≥1 Sound Healing)
evaluators.description: Checks whether the user saved, after baseline, a 5-day custom retreat starting next month with a mid-range room type and exactly three workshops under $50 each, including at least one sound healing workshop.

evaluators.name: Cart Contains Exactly One Cushion < $60, One Journal < $25, One Incense ≥ 4★
evaluators.description: Checks whether the active cart contains exactly three line items: one qualifying meditation cushion under $60, one qualifying journal under $25, and one qualifying incense product rated at least 4 stars, each with quantity 1.

evaluators.name: Register for Free Weekday Evening Community Event This Month with >20 Spots Remaining (1 Attendee)
evaluators.description: Checks whether, after baseline, the user registered for a free community/community_circle event this month that occurs on a weekday evening (start ≥ 18:00) with more than 20 spots remaining, for exactly one attendee.

evaluators.name: Create 'Bedtime Practice' Playlist with Exactly Three Guided Sleep/Rest Audios (10–20 min, ≥4.5★)
evaluators.description: Checks whether the user created a playlist named 'Bedtime Practice' and added exactly three unique guided audio meditations about sleep or rest, each 10–20 minutes long with rating at least 4.5.

evaluators.name: FAQ Search for 'wheelchair' and Contact About Wheelchair Access & Dairy-Free Meals (Phone, Accessibility/Dietary Topic)
evaluators.description: Checks whether the user searched FAQs for 'wheelchair' (instrumentation), then submitted a contact message about wheelchair access and dairy-free meal options for retreats, using the accessibility & dietary topic and phone as the preferred contact method.
